claims.summary: Source-prepared ESN review values must not masquerade as live operational control.
claims.disposition: verify review packets state their dormant boundary and live step ownership remains separate

claims.summary: Dynamic noise should remain finite, bounded, and continuous at representative gradient and pressure inputs.
claims.disposition: verify existing dynamic-noise bounds, finite fallback, pressure-room, and smooth-knee regressions cover the requested logic

claims.summary: Dynamic noise and viscous rho could be wired into the live ESN loop to make analytical guidance operational.
claims.disposition: retain as an exact Tier 5 reservoir-mathematics change requiring operator approval, replay, canary, and abort criteria
